articles.title: All the stories that got the Spa paddock talking
articles.summary: Max Verstappen's future was the hot topic of conversation as the Formula 1 paddock reconvened at Spa for the Belgian Grand Prix. But there were plenty of other intriguing stories bubbling at the penultimate race weekend

articles.title: Best value early bets for the Belgian Grand Prix
articles.summary: We’ve assessed the latest betting markets and selected our pick of early bets offering the best value at Spa-Francorchamps.

articles.title: Norris explains the thinking behind grid penalty in Belgium
articles.summary: Lando Norris has explained why McLaren has decided to take a 10-place grid drop for the reigning World Champion at this weekend's Belgian Grand Prix.

articles.title: Why Russell feels 'like a golfer changing his swing'
articles.summary: Ahead of the Belgian Grand Prix, George Russell detailed why he has found it challenging to maximise the performance of his Mercedes.

articles.title: Piastri gives update amid Verstappen to McLaren reports
articles.summary: Oscar Piastri has offered an update on his position with McLaren amid ongoing speculation that Max Verstappen will replace him at the team, stating "I'm happy with where I am".

articles.title: 'Time to really crack the whip' in Belgium – Hamilton
articles.summary: Lewis Hamilton believes "it's time to really crack the whip", as the Ferrari driver looks to further close the gap to Mercedes’ Kimi Antonelli in the title fight at the Belgian Grand Prix.

articles.title: Leclerc backs Vasseur on Ferrari budget cap talk
articles.summary: Charles Leclerc has shared his confidence in Ferrari to continue improving whilst managing the budget cap.

articles.title: Antonelli addresses title gap to Russell after ‘bad luck’

articles.title: Verstappen reflects on the possibility of staying at Red Bull
articles.summary: Max Verstappen has given his thoughts on the recent speculation that he may not fulfil his current contract with Red Bull.

articles.title: Our early Bet Builder for the Belgian Grand Prix
articles.summary: Our expert betting writers have picked a four-leg early Bet Builder, including podium finish, top-six finish and two point-scoring picks.

articles.title: GP da Bélgica de F1: Lewis Hamilton exige esforço máximo à Ferrari
articles.summary: Lewis Hamilton afirmou que é “tempo de realmente dar o máximo e fazer melhor” na luta pelo campeonato mundial de Fórmula 1. O piloto da Ferrari procura reduzir a desvantagem pontual frente à Mercedes e ao líder Kimi Anto

articles.title: F1, Max Verstappen e o futuro na Red Bull: tudo o que disse
articles.summary: O futuro de Max Verstappen na Red Bull Racing continua a ser alvo de especulação no paddock da Fórmula 1, mas o piloto neerlandês mantém-se focado na resolução dos problemas competitivos que a equipa enfrenta atualmente.

articles.summary: Lando Norris, piloto da McLaren, foi sancionado com uma penalização de dez lugares na grelha de partida para o Grande Prémio da Bélgica de Fórmula 1, que se disputa este fim de semana em Spa-Francorchamps. A decisão surg

articles.title: Eifel Rallye Festival: ‘Thunderstruck’ do asfalto em Daun
articles.summary: A Vulkaneifel prepara-se para acolher, entre 23 e 25 de julho de 2026, a 14ª edição do ADAC Eifel Rallye Festival, um encontro internacional que reúne mais de 160 veículos históricos originais ou reconstruídos com rigor.
